ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "price" TEXT /* Selling price of the book */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who rated the book */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who reviewed the book */,
  "review" TEXT /* In-depth review written by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level at the store */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level required to trigger reordering */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the minimum stock level is reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points required to redeem the reward */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward offered to customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_enrollment_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_enrollment_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_program ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)
